Account: Acme Corp
Opportunity: Acme – Platform Expansion Q1
Link: https://crm.internal/opps/acme-platform-q1
Stage: 3 - Proposal
AE: Jane Smith

The experimentation team has been engaged to evaluate the impact of feature flags on Acme's release velocity. Acme is evaluating their deployment pipeline and has shown strong interest in LaunchDarkly's AI configuration capabilities.

Evidence:
- https://analytics.internal/exp/acme-flags-2025
- https://crm.internal/notes/acme-exec-call-mar

Competitive context: Acme mentioned evaluating Split.io during their last QBR.

Exec sponsor: VP Engineering Mark Lee is actively involved in the evaluation.

Next checkpoint: 2025-04-15

Account: Beta Inc
Opportunity: Beta – Support Renewal FY25
Link: https://crm.internal/opps/beta-support-renewal
Stage: 6 - Closed Won
AE: Bob Jones

Standard support renewal. No experimentation discussion. Customer is satisfied with current implementation and not exploring new capabilities.

Reference: https://crm.internal/notes/beta-renewal-review

Account: Gamma Systems
Opportunity: Gamma – Enterprise Rollout
Link: https://crm.internal/opps/gamma-enterprise
Stage: 2 - Discovery
AE: Carol White

Gamma is exploring feature management for their microservices architecture. Early conversations suggest moderate interest but no formal experimentation engagement yet. No competitive evaluation mentioned. No exec sponsor identified.

Evidence:
- https://analytics.internal/exp/gamma-discovery-2025

Next checkpoint: 2025-05-01
